title: Heathrow Express Class 387/377 Electrostar [MTR4]
description: Adds the Heathrow Express livery to the Class 377/387 for Minecraft Transit Railway!
body:
![Side view of a Heathrow Express Class 387](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f99a035cd1689c9106db99a34e2ae6668f43060.png)

**Go from the Airport to London Paddington in style, for a price!** The Heathrow Express Class 387 EMU is here!

With a full-rake consist available, custom interior, and 387-style windows, the GWR Class 387 Air is the perfect accompaniment to the rest of your [Great Western Railway Class 387](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gwr387mtr4) fleet on the Mainline!

Requires: MTR4 only.

Contains:
Class 387 Heathrow Express w/Business First coach
